name: Hunan Hot Pepper & Black Bean Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 tablespoons Fermented black beans (rinsed and drained)
2 tablespoons Each dry sherry and sesame oil
recipeInstructions:
1. In a jar or bowl, combine the oil, red pepper, black beans, garlic, sherry, sesame oil, and salt.
2. Cover tightly with foil.
3. Place the jar on a rack over simmering water.
4. Steam for 45 minutes, covering with foil.
5. Allow to cool completely, then cover and refrigerate indefinitely.
6. Serve at room temperature. Makes 1/2 cup
